zh.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV是Adam de Dutton和Agnes FitzAlured的兒子，出生在英國英格蘭爾瓦布爾頓。他於大約1235年與Margaret Ashelegh在英國英格蘭爾格亞特 布德沃斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1276年在英國英格蘭爾格亞特 布德沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV was born in Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Adam de Dutton and Agnes FitzAlured. He married Margaret Ashelegh about 1235, in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1276, in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV est né à Warburton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Adam de Dutton et Agnes FitzAlured. Il a épousé Margaret Ashelegh environ 1235, à Great Budworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1276, à Great Budworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IVはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーブルトンでAdam de DuttonとAgnes FitzAluredの息子として生まれた。約1235年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアグレアト ブドウオルスでMargaret Asheleghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1276年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアグレアト ブドウオルスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워버턴에서 Adam de Dutton(와)과 Agnes FitzAlured의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 그리트 버드워스에서 Margaret Ashelegh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 그리트 버드워스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV родился в местности варбуртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Adam de Dutton и Agnes FitzAlured. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Ashelegh около 1235 г. в местности грит будворт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1276 г. в местности грит будворт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
